# Twisi - Twitch Dashboard Project

This is an Astro project for displaying Twitch stream information with a bento grid layout.

## Project Structure
- Astro with TypeScript
- Bento grid layout with 6+ containers
- Pink, white, and light blue color scheme
- Features: Twitch stream embed, chat, description, live/offline status

## Development
- Run `npm run dev` to start development server
- Project uses Astro components and modern CSS Grid
